hooks.prompt:
Check if any code files were modified in the current git working tree (git diff --name-only HEAD and git diff --name-only --cached). If no code files (.ts, .tsx, .js, .jsx, .vue, .svelte, .css, .scss) were modified, respond {"ok": true}. Otherwise run these checks:
1. npm run type:check
2. npm run lint
3. npm run format:check
If all pass, respond {"ok": true}. If any fail, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "<which check failed and key error output>"}.
